overall.description: A first-person exploration through a cyberpunk interior environment, transitioning from a green-lit control room through red emergency corridors to a panoramic window overlooking a neon-lit futuristic cityscape. The camera moves through medical areas and encounters characters before ending in a control room, showcasing high-fidelity game engine rendering with atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow corridor with red emergency lighting and chain-link fencing. The scene opens to a large window revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape with towering neon-lit buildings and light trails from traffic below.

segments.scene_description: Panning across a large panoramic window overlooking a dense cyberpunk metropolis with flying vehicles and neon advertisements. A character stands near boxes looking out at the view. The camera continues past medical equipment and steam vents.

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a medical bay featuring a treatment gurney, multiple wall-mounted monitors displaying data, and scattered papers on the floor. The area has red emergency lighting and graffiti on the walls before transitioning back to corridor spaces.

segments.scene_description: Entering a final control room with exposed ceiling infrastructure and server racks. A character sits at a desk working on computers with glowing screens. The lighting shifts back to the cooler blue-green tones seen at the start, completing the circuit through the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-tech facility that transitions from a green-lit control room through red emergency zones and into a panoramic view of a neon metropolis. It begins in a dimly lit space illuminated by green neon tubes and computer monitors, moving past a cluttered desk toward a doorway bathed in red emergency lighting. As the camera enters a narrow corridor lined with chain-link fencing, the scene opens onto a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape filled with towering buildings and flying vehicles, where a character stands observing the view. The movement then shifts past steam vents and into a medical bay featuring treatment gurneys and graffiti-covered walls under persistent red alarms before turning back toward the facility's interior. Finally, the camera enters a terminal control room filled with server racks and exposed infrastructure, where the lighting shifts back to cool blue-green tones as it approaches a character working at a glowing computer station.
